title: Netherite Ingot Advancement
description: This Datapack and Mod adds a new advancement for obtaining a Netherite Ingot, translated into multiple languages (+20), compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1
body:
# Netherite Ingot Advancement

**This DataPack and Mod** adds new advancement for obtaining a Netherite Ingot , translated into multiple languages, compatible with version 1.20 to 26.1

![Netherite Ingot Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/791473d9096efd65c3329d48e8c92e30d0de8180.png)
> **Advancement Labs © - 2026**

## Notas📝 (Notes)
- **Netherite Ingot Advancement** is **compatible** with versions **1.20 to 26.1**🏷️
- **Netherite Ingot Advancement** is compatible with any **functions and advancements Datapack in the World**
- **Netherite Ingot Advancement** it has been translated into more than **20 Languages**
- **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️
